# Reinforcement Learning as Dynamic Programming {#sec-rl-dp}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## Learning Objectives
- Derive RL from first principles as approximate dynamic programming
- Implement value iteration and policy iteration for small MDPs
- Apply Q-learning when the state space is too large for exact DP
- Connect Bellman equations to neural network value function approximation
:::

## Introduction

*Coming soon.*

## Summary

## Further Reading
